response.justification: Bogdan is a highly disciplined software engineer with 20 years of experience and strong architectural fundamentals, but represents a poor domain fit. His recent career (past 5+ years) has diverged significantly from C++ and systems programming toward full-stack web, fintech, and AI infrastructure. C++ experience is over a decade old, and there is no evidence of industrial automation, IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards, or key IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP) required for the role.
strengths: 20 years of professional experience with demonstrated mastery of software craftsmanship, TDD, CI/CD, and distributed systems architecture
Proven ability to design and scale event-driven platforms handling millions of requests per second, plus active mentoring and open-source contributions
Full-stack capability across multiple languages and paradigms, showing strong problem-solving and adaptability across domains
concerns: C++ expertise is 10+ years outdated; most recent development (past 5 years) centers on TypeScript/Node.js, not systems programming
Zero demonstrated background in industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850), or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards—core requirements for the role
Career trajectory moves away from embedded/systems programming toward web platforms and AI infrastructure, suggesting misalignment with this role's technical depth requirements

key_factors.factor: C++ currency and systems programming experience
Industrial automation and cybersecurity standards knowledge
Software engineering fundamentals and architectural design capability
